title: Miami Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Miami, with a Z-Score of +3.00. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Miami are characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 9.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 71%, and the wind speed is moderate at 8.9 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has significant implications for the city's infrastructure and daily life, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
